source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/01_HAD1717MC(MG)/▶ CE MDD/■ 3. 3차 CE TCF 보안사항 제출 (12월10일)/06. Clinical evaluation report/A-CLSP-01 Clinical Literature Searching Protocol.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Protocol for systematic clinical literature searches to support performance and safety evaluation of HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC digital flat panel X-ray detectors.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides the literature search strategy, selection criteria, appraisal stages, PMS/PMCF update approach, and attachments feeding the clinical literature searching report and clinical evaluation report.
keyPoints: The protocol aims to verify product performance and safety in clinical terms by systematically searching and analyzing clinical literature.
Data sources include ScienceDirect, PubMed, and Google.
Literature selection is to comply with MEDDEV 2.7.1 Rev. 4 and evaluate technical, clinical, and biological equivalence.
The protocol states post market surveillance activities will be considered in document reviews and significant clinical evaluation updates will be informed to the NB.
The protocol should be updated at least every 3 years to reflect recent publications and technical trends.

concepts.name: Clinical literature search protocol
concepts.evidence: This protocol is aimed to verify our product's performance and safety in clinical terms by systematically searching out clinical literature of our product and analyzing such searched literature.

concepts.name: Digital flat panel X-ray detector
concepts.evidence: Digital Flat Panel X-ray detector HAD1717MG, HAD1717MC

concepts.name: Literature search strategy
concepts.evidence: We intended to find literature about the performance and safety, performance, clinical data nature, history.

concepts.name: Technical equivalence
concepts.evidence: Technical equivalence -Similar design’ -Specification (function and performance) -Principle of operation

concepts.name: Clinical equivalence
concepts.evidence: Clinical equivalence -Similar Condition of use (IFU) -Same clinical condition -Same intended purpose -Application site on the body -Target population -Same side effect

concepts.name: Biological equivalence
concepts.evidence: Biological equivalence -Same material -Contact with same body fluid or tissue -Same duration of contact

concepts.name: Clinical data appraisal
concepts.evidence: 4.2 Summary and appraisal of clinical data (Stage 2)

concepts.name: Post market surveillance
concepts.evidence: H&abyz Co., Ltd. will perform post market surveillance activities which will be considered at every documents reviews by quality manager

evidence.claim: The document is File No. A-CLSP-01, Rev. No. 0, with revision date Sep/05/2019.
evidence.evidenceText: File No. A-CLSP-01 Rev. No. 0 Rev. Date Sep/05/2019

evidence.claim: The protocol covers HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC digital flat panel X-ray detectors.
evidence.evidenceText: Digital Flat Panel X-ray detector HAD1717MG, HAD1717MC

evidence.claim: The stated purpose is to verify product performance and safety through systematic clinical literature search and analysis.
evidence.evidenceText: This protocol is aimed to verify our product's performance and safety in clinical terms by systematically searching out clinical literature of our product and analyzing such searched literature.

evidence.claim: Clinical literature search sources are ScienceDirect, PubMed, and Google.
evidence.evidenceText: Sources of DATA A. http://www.sciencedirect.com B. https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/ C. http://www.google.com

evidence.claim: The protocol uses design, similar digital radiography performance range, intended use, clinical contents, flat panel detector, and X-ray as data selection considerations.
evidence.evidenceText: Design, similar range of digital radiography performance and Intended Use, clinical contents, flat panel detector, x-ray

evidence.claim: The background states flat panel detectors are used for digital radiography, which requires good X-ray image quality and low radiation dose.
evidence.evidenceText: Flat panel detector is Used to Digital radiography technique. Digital radiography is required good X-ray image quality and low radiation dose.

evidence.claim: The protocol intends to establish equivalence to the device under evaluation or relevance of benchmark devices to clinical evaluation.
evidence.evidenceText: We will establish equivalence to the device under evaluation or the relevance of benchmark devices to the clinical evaluation.

evidence.claim: The first literature elimination filters include free full text and publication dates from 2000/01/01 to 2019/09/05.
evidence.evidenceText: Filters activated: Free full text, Publication date from 2000/01/01 to 2019/09/05.

evidence.claim: Evaluation criteria for clinical data value are based on MEDDEV 2.7/1 Rev4-A6 when trials lack scientific validity to demonstrate clinical performance and safety.
evidence.evidenceText: The criteria for evaluating the value of clinical data are based on the case of a trial lacking scientific validity to demonstrate adequate clinical performance and clinical safety in accordance with MEDDEV 2.7/1 Rev4-A6.

evidence.claim: Clinical investigations are expected to follow EN ISO 14155 or a comparable standard, local regulations, and the Declaration of Helsinki.
evidence.evidenceText: Clinical investigations are generally expected to be designed, conducted and reported in accordance with EN ISO 14155 or to a comparable standard, and in compliance with local regulations and the Declaration of Helsinki.

evidence.claim: Searched literature must comply with MEDDEV 2.7.1 Rev. 4, June 2016.
evidence.evidenceText: The searched literature must be complied with MEDDEV 2.7.1 (Rev. 4, June 2016) as shown below in the Flow Chart.

evidence.claim: Stage 0 covers scope and context of evaluation, including covered products/models/sizes/settings, technology, conditions of use, intended purpose, and clinical performance or safety claims.
evidence.evidenceText: explains the scope and context of the evaluation, including which products/ models/ sizes/ settings are covered by the clinical evaluation report, the technology on which the medical device is based, the conditions of use and the intended purpose of the device; documents any claims made about the device’s clinical performance or clinical safety.

evidence.claim: Stage 1 identifies pertinent data by explaining the literature search strategy and presenting the nature and extent of clinical and relevant pre-clinical data.
evidence.evidenceText: explains the literature search strategy; presents the nature and extent of the clinical data and relevant pre-clinical data that have been identified.

evidence.claim: Stage 2 appraises pertinent data using criteria, summaries, methodological quality, scientific validity, relevance, evidence weighting, limitations, and justifications for rejection.
evidence.evidenceText: explains the criteria used by the evaluators for appraising data sets; summarises the pertinent data sets... evaluates their methodological quality, scientific validity, the relevance for the evaluation, the weighting attributed to the evidence, and any limitations; presents justifications for rejecting certain data or documents.

evidence.claim: Stage 3 analyzes whether evidence is sufficient to demonstrate clinical performance and clinical safety for the device under evaluation.
evidence.evidenceText: explains if and how the referenced information... constitute sufficient clinical evidence for demonstration of the clinical performance and clinical safety of the device under evaluation

evidence.claim: The protocol includes PMS inputs such as customer satisfaction reports, complaint reports, recall data of other brand devices, and literature.
evidence.evidenceText: We will gather or survey customer satisfaction report, complain report, recall data of other brand device data, literature or etc.

evidence.claim: H&abyz Co., Ltd. will perform post market surveillance activities and consider them in document reviews by the quality manager for PMCF under MEDDEV 2.12-2.
evidence.evidenceText: H&abyz Co., Ltd. will perform post market surveillance activities which will be considered at every documents reviews by quality manager for Post Market Clinical-follow-up(MEDDEV 2.12-2).

evidence.claim: Significant updates to clinical evaluation based on post market experience or scientific publication will be informed to NB at every case.
evidence.evidenceText: Also related significant update to clinical evaluation which based on post market experience or scientific publication, H&abyz Co., Ltd. will inform to NB at every case.

evidence.claim: The protocol should be updated at least every 3 years to reflect recent publications and technical trends.
evidence.evidenceText: This protocol should be updated at least every 3 years to reflect recent publications and technical trends.

evidence.claim: The literature search results are attached to the Clinical Literature Searching Report and Clinical Evaluation Report.
evidence.evidenceText: The literature search results are attached to the Clinical literature searching report and clinical evaluation report.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is not stated as a single issuing authority or jurisdiction; source text references MEDDEV guidance, MDD essential requirements, EN ISO 14155, local regulations, Declaration of Helsinki, and NB.
Document uses inconsistent wording and grammar in several sections, but key metadata and regulatory references are readable.
